name: Favorite Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Mix shortening, sugar, and egg together thoroughly until smooth.
3. Blend in molasses and boiling water.
4. Sift flour, baking soda, salt, ginger, and cinnamon together and stir into the mixture until well combined.
5. Pour batter into a well-greased and floured 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes at 325 degrees F (F).
7. Cut into 3-inch squares in the pan.
8. Keep hot and serve piping hot with sweetened whipped cream or applesauce.
